'''âzh-d-z''' ('''kazhadaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wull|wull]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-d-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wull|wull]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-d-z
|-
! Lemma
| kazhadaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhadaz|thizhadaz]] || [[word:jizhadaz|jizhadaz]] || [[word:shizhadaz|shizhadaz]] || [[word:kizhadaz|kizhadaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhadaz|thuthuzhadaz]] || [[word:jujuzhadaz|jujuzhadaz]] || [[word:shushuzhadaz|shushuzhadaz]] || [[word:kukuzhadaz|kukuzhadaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhadaz|thuzhadaz]] || [[word:juzhadaz|juzhadaz]] || [[word:shuzhadaz|shuzhadaz]] || [[word:kuzhadaz|kuzhadaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhadaz|thuzhadaz]] || [[word:juzhadaz|juzhadaz]] || [[word:shuzhadaz|shuzhadaz]] || [[word:kuzhadaz|kuzhadaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhadaz|thezhadaz]] || [[word:jezhadaz|jezhadaz]] || [[word:shezhadaz|shezhadaz]] || [[word:kezhadaz|kezhadaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhadaz|thothozhadaz]] || [[word:jojozhadaz|jojozhadaz]] || [[word:shoshozhadaz|shoshozhadaz]] || [[word:kokozhadaz|kokozhadaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhadaz|thozhadaz]] || [[word:jozhadaz|jozhadaz]] || [[word:shozhadaz|shozhadaz]] || [[word:kozhadaz|kozhadaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhadaz|thozhadaz]] || [[word:jozhadaz|jozhadaz]] || [[word:shozhadaz|shozhadaz]] || [[word:kozhadaz|kozhadaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhadaz|thĂŠzhadaz]] || [[word:jĂŠzhadaz|jĂŠzhadaz]] || [[word:shĂŠzhadaz|shĂŠzhadaz]] || [[word:kĂŠzhadaz|kĂŠzhadaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhadaz|thathazhadaz]] || [[word:jajazhadaz|jajazhadaz]] || [[word:shashazhadaz|shashazhadaz]] || [[word:kakazhadaz|kakazhadaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhadaz|thazhadaz]] || [[word:jazhadaz|jazhadaz]] || [[word:shazhadaz|shazhadaz]] || [[word:kazhadaz|kazhadaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhadaz|thazhadaz]] || [[word:jazhadaz|jazhadaz]] || [[word:shazhadaz|shazhadaz]] || [[word:kazhadaz|kazhadaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhadaz|shazhadaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhadaz|goshazhadaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhadaz|gokishazhadaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhadaznĂŒ|shazhadaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadaznknĂŒ|goshazhadaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadaznĂŒ|gokishazhadaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhadazshĂ«|shazhadazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkshĂ«|goshazhadaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhadazshĂ«|gokishazhadazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadazro|shazhadazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkro|goshazhadaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadazro|gokishazhadazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadazmu|shazhadazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkmu|goshazhadaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadazmu|gokishazhadazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhadazsher|shazhadazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhadaznksher|goshazhadaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhadazsher|gokishazhadazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhadazng|shazhadazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkng|goshazhadaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhadazng|gokishazhadazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhadazya|shazhadazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkya|goshazhadaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhadazya|gokishazhadazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhadazyam|shazhadazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkyam|goshazhadaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhadazyam|gokishazhadazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadaznĂŒshĂ«|shazhadaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhadaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhadaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadaznĂŒro|shazhadaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadaznknĂŒro|goshazhadaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadaznĂŒro|gokishazhadaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadaznĂŒmu|shazhadaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadaznknĂŒmu|goshazhadaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadaznĂŒmu|gokishazhadaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadazshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhadazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhadaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhadazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadazshĂ«ro|shazhadazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkshĂ«ro|goshazhadaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadazshĂ«ro|gokishazhadazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadazshĂ«mu|shazhadazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkshĂ«mu|goshazhadaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadazshĂ«mu|gokishazhadazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadazronĂŒ|shazhadazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkronĂŒ|goshazhadaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadazronĂŒ|gokishazhadazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadazroshĂ«|shazhadazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkroshĂ«|goshazhadaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadazroshĂ«|gokishazhadazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadazromu|shazhadazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkromu|goshazhadaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadazromu|gokishazhadazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadazmunĂŒ|shazhadazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkmunĂŒ|goshazhadaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadazmunĂŒ|gokishazhadazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadazmushĂ«|shazhadazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkmushĂ«|goshazhadaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadazmushĂ«|gokishazhadazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadazmuro|shazhadazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadaznkmuro|goshazhadaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadazmuro|gokishazhadazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
